Video.summary: Learn how the first churches came into being, based architecturally on the secular pagan "basilica."
Video.grandparentTitle: The World's Greatest Churches
Video.title: The Earliest Churches

Video.summary: Trace the history of the building and of the medieval reconstruction we see today.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World's Greatest Churches
Video.title: The Church of the Holy Sepulchre

Image.alt: The Church of the Holy Sepulchre
The Church of the Holy Sepulchre
The Church of the Holy Sepulchre

Video.summary: Consider the nature of Athenian democracy and how it functioned in practice.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: Why Athenian Democracy Matters

Video.summary: Delve into Homer's epics to examine several early examples of democratic assembly.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: The Origins of Greek Democracy

Video.summary: Learn what the Dead Sea Scrolls are, the story of their unlikely discovery.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The Discoveries and Their Significance

Video.summary: Discover more about how scholars gained access to the first seven scrolls discovered at Qumran.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Dead Sea Scrolls
Video.title: The First Seven Scrolls

Video.summary: How has Japanese culture been shaped by powerful cycles of globalization and isolation?
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Japan: A Cultural History
Video.title: Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation

Image.alt: Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation
Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation
Japan: A Globally Engaged Island Nation

Video.summary: Get an engaging introduction to ancient Japanese myths, collectively known as Shint? ("Way of the Gods").
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Japan: A Cultural History
Video.title: Understanding Japan through Ancient Myths

Video.summary: While numbers are precise, the exact definition of "number" remains elusive.
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: The Ever-Evolving Notion of Number

Video.summary: One of the earliest questions humans asked one another was: "How many?"
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: The Dawn of Numbers

Video.summary: As numbers became useful to calculate and predict, arithmetic developed.
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: Speaking the Language of Numbers

Video.summary: When calculation became more important, zero a crucial breakthrough was born.
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: The Dramatic Digits-The Power of Zero

Image.alt: The Dramatic Digits-The Power of Zero
The Dramatic Digits-The Power of Zero
The Dramatic Digits-The Power of Zero

Video.summary: As numbers developed from tools into a branch of learning, they gained power and mystery.
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: The Magical and Spiritual Allure of Numbers

Image.alt: The Magical and Spiritual Allure of Numbers
The Magical and Spiritual Allure of Numbers
The Magical and Spiritual Allure of Numbers

Video.summary: Connect the Fibonacci numbers to the golden ratio studied by Pythagoreans centuries earlier.
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: Nature's Numbers-Patterns without People

Video.summary: Study prime numbers, the building blocks of all natural (counting) numbers larger than 1.
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: Numbers of Prime Importance

Video.summary: Babylonians and Egyptians used rational numbers perhaps as early as 2,000 B.C.
Video.grandparentTitle: Zero to Infinity: A History of Numbers
Video.title: Challenging the Rationality of Numbers

Video.summary: Witness how fossil evidence and molecular evidence can explain anthropology's most complex issues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: Ramapithecus—Ape Man

Video.summary: Where exactly did Homo come from? Follow the highly public story here.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: Australopithecus afarensis—Ancestor or Not?

Video.summary: In this episode, closely examine the fossil and genetic evidence of a fascinating "ground ape."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: Ardipithecus—Hominin or Not?

Video.summary: Investigate hominid brain size in the fossil record, and shed new light on brain size and skull structure.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: Brain Structure versus Brain Size

Video.summary: Explore diet and morphology in this episode on Australopithecus robustus and Australopithecus africanus.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: The Dietary Hypothesis

Video.summary: Learn how we found the truth about where our genus Homo came from'and where it evolved.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: Africa or Asia?

Video.summary: Professor Martin offers you a detailed picture of what early stone toolmakers were like.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: An Ape's View of the Oldowan

Image.alt: An Ape's View of the Oldowan
An Ape's View of the Oldowan
An Ape's View of the Oldowan

Video.summary: What do we known about the species that sits between Australopithecines and the rest of the genus Homo?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Humans: Great Scientific Debates
Video.title: Who Was Homo habilis?
